name: Austria
description: Austria offers a rich academic tradition, affordable tuition, and a central European location. Vienna is consistently ranked among the world's most livable cities, making it perfect for students.

tuitionFees.undergraduate: Proof of sufficient financial means to cover the living costs [as of 2024]:
tuitionFees.phd: Often funded through FWF fellowships or university assistantships

scholarships.name: Evidence of payment of tuition fee or acceptance of scholarship for the intended studies in Austria
scholarships.eligibility: Proof of sufficient funds to cover overall cost of living during the probable duration of study Proof of accommodation in Austria or letter of acceptance at the school’s / college’s / university’s dor

requirements: Valid passport (valid 3 months beyond intended stay)
Proof of financial means (€924/month for Vienna)
Application for student visa (Type D) at Austrian embassy

workPermit.duringStudy: Up to 20 hours per week during term time
workPermit.postStudy: 12-month job-seeker residence permit; Red-White-Red card for qualified graduates

languageRequirements.notes: German B2 for German programs; English programs widely available

faqs.question: Is it easy to get a student visa for Austria?
faqs.answer: With proper documentation and financial proof, obtaining a student visa for Austria is straightforward. MVR Consultants can guide you through the entire process.

faqs.question: What are the tuition fees in Austria?
faqs.answer: Tuition fees vary by university and program. Contact our counselors for program-specific fee structures.

faqs.question: Can I work while studying?
faqs.answer: Most countries allow international students to work part-time during term time. Specific hours and conditions depend on the country's immigration rules.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships available for Indian students?
faqs.answer: Yes, many universities and governments offer merit-based and need-based scholarships for international students. Ask our counselors for scholarship matching.
